name: Pilsner Urquell Virtual Brewery Tour SG

reviews.review_title: Smart and Now I want a Beer!
reviews.review_description: Very good idea , Lots of fun!

This was a great tour. I thought it was fun that you could scoop up the barley. Also enjoyed seeing how the beer was still tested by a brewmaster the same way it was done in tbe 1800's. Informative and enjoyable . Highly reccomended!
